xwikidoc.title: Project Specifications
xwikidoc.content:
= 📐 Project Specifications =
{{info}} This page describes what the project should deliver, how it should behave, and which OpenProject tickets support the implementation. {{/info}}
== 📝 Functional Requirements ==
|= ID |= Requirement |= Status |REQ-001 |The system should support the main user workflow. |New |REQ-002 |The system should validate user input before submission. |New |REQ-003 |The system should provide clear feedback after each action. |New
== ⚙️ Technical Notes ==
* Architecture overview: //placeholder// * Main dependencies: //placeholder// * External systems: //placeholder// * Security considerations: //placeholder// * Deployment notes: //placeholder//
== 📅 Project Calendar ==
{{openprojectcalendar firstDay="MONDAY" types="WORK_PACKAGE"/}}
== 🔎 Specification-Related Tickets ==
{{openproject limit="10"/}}
== ✅ Acceptance Criteria ==
* The core workflow is documented and reviewed. * All major requirements are linked to OpenProject tickets. * Open questions are tracked as tickets. * Delivery dates are visible in the project calendar.
